question: What defensive ability is possessed by the creature known as the 'Thorned Crawler' in the Bioluminescent Forest?

answers.original:
The Thorned Crawler grows razor-sharp crystalline thorns when threatened.

### References

- [1] Thorned Crawler
answers.perturbed:
The Phase-Lurker can temporarily shift its body into an intangible state when threatened, allowing attacks to pass through it harmlessly.

### References

- [1] Phase-Lurker

entities.name: Thorned Crawler
entities.description: The Thorned Crawler is a creature that grows razor-sharp crystalline thorns when threatened and feeds on glowing insects.<SEP>The Thorned Crawler is the strongest creature in the Bioluminescent Forest, capable of growing razor-sharp crystalline thorns when threatened.

entities.name: Bioluminescent Forest
entities.description: The Bioluminescent Forest is a vibrant ecosystem known for its glowing flora and fauna.<SEP>The Bioluminescent Forest is a vibrant ecosystem known for its unique life forms that emit light.

entities.name: Glowing Insects
entities.description: Glowing insects are prey for the Thorned Crawler.<SEP>Glowing insects are a food source for the Thorned Crawler in the Bioluminescent Forest.

entities.name: Glowing Fauna
entities.description: Glowing fauna are animals that emit light and are part of the Bioluminescent Forest's ecosystem.

entities.name: Phase-Lurker
entities.description: The Phase-Lurker can temporarily shift its body into an intangible state when threatened, allowing attacks to pass through it harmlessly.
